title: EATF OVERT 1.0 receipt (as embedded in an AEP v1 package)
description: Validates the overt_receipt.json entry inside an AEP v1 evidence package. Wire format documented in docs/aep-profile.md. The receipt cross-references several manifest fields and witness file paths; this schema constrains shape, not cross-document consistency (which the verifier checks).

overt.description: OVERT receipt version. v0.1 packages MUST set this to '1.0.0'.

profile.description: Profile URN identifying the EATF AEP wire format. MUST equal 'urn:eatf:spec:aep:1.0' for v0.1 packages.

profile_revision.description: Optional human-readable revision identifier for the profile (e.g. '1.0-draft').

scope.description: OVERT scope URN. Identifies the class of action being attested. v0.1 examples: 'foundational:aep-response', 'agentic-extended:mcp-tools-call'.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical.bin, formatted 'sha256:<64 lowercase hex>'. MUST equal the value the verifier computes from canonical.bin.

subject.description: Identifier and metadata for the entity the attestation is about (typically the agent + its tenant).

agent_id.description: URN identifying the agent. Conventional shape: urn:eatf:tenant:<tenant>:agent:<slug>. MAY be null for sign-only response packages without an agent identity.

tenant_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the deployment-local tenant identifier (or all-zeros for fixtures). Hex without prefix, OR formatted 'sha256:<hex>'. MAY be null for foundational-scope receipts that do not bind to a tenant.

system.description: Free-form identifier of the system that produced the receipt (e.g. 'eatf-aep', 'eatf-mcp-gateway').

revision.description: Optional revision identifier for the producing system.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp at which the event occurred. SHOULD match metadata.created_at when both are present.

action_type.description: Specific action classifier. SHOULD match metadata.action_type when both are present.

policy.description: Policy evaluation outcome. All fields are optional and nullable for v0.1 — foundational-scope receipts often carry no policy at all, in which case every value is null. When fields are present (typically on agentic-extended scopes), they SHOULD match the corresponding metadata.json fields; verifier enforces the cross-check.

coverage.description: Fraction of policy rules that successfully evaluated.

prev.description: Reference to a preceding receipt in a chain. NULL when the receipt is standalone or starts a chain.

witness.description: Pointers to the cryptographic-witness files inside the same AEP package.

iap.description: Independent attestation provider identifier. Free-form string identifying who produced or preserved the package.

signature_refs.description: Names of signature files inside the same AEP package. MUST be non-empty. Each entry MUST resolve to an existing file in the envelope; the verifier checks this.

timestamp_refs.description: Names of RFC 3161 timestamp files inside the same AEP package. MAY be empty for transitional packages without a timestamp.
